project.name: RSS Reader
project.status: In Progress - Integrated Smart Content Extraction

database_schema.summary: Quản lý RSS feeds, tin tức đã cache và lịch sử đọc
database_schema.relationships_explained: Một feed (rss_feed) chứa nhiều tin tự động cache (cached_news). Trạng thái đọc của tin được lưu ở (read_news).

business_rules: Lịch sử đọc giữ trong 7 ngày
URL Normalization: Loại bỏ tracking params (utm_, fbclid) để tránh trùng lặp tin
Continuous mode đọc liên tục các tin lấy tự động (sắp hỗ trợ landscape mode)
Extraction Strategy: Custom > Site-Specific > Readability4J > Generic
features: Media Button support with auto-refresh batching

patterns: Concurrent memory cache for read IDs (防止 Race Condition)
Model-First Rotation: Try same model across all API keys before fallback to heavier/preview model
gotchas: Room limitations with empty collections in IN clause (causes Crash) - Use NoExclude query variant
N+1 query issues - Use DB-side ID filtering instead of loading all to RAM
Jsoup charset corruption when passing String - Always pass InputStream/ByteArray for auto-detection
Voz.vn large DOM CPU spikes - Use Regex to detect redirects before Parsing
Memory leak via doc.clone(): Jsoup cloning duplicates large DOMs. Clean HTML as strings instead.
Readability4J SLF4J Dependency: Missing binder causes R8 build failure. Use -dontwarn org.slf4j.**
conventions: Use Flow for observing DB changes
Use suspend functions for DAO queries
Always normalize RSS URLs before processing
Avoid doc.clone() in Jsoup - Use string-based cleaning for memory efficiency
Prefer Regex extraction over Jsoup when possible for speed
Use Readability4J for unknown sites to improve Gemini summary quality
